About

Putu Herdy Kurniawan

Engineering professional with cross-functional experience across pharmaceutical engineering, process systems, HVAC/AHU/VRF, BMS/BAS, instrumentation, electrical utilities, and energy improvement initiatives.

My background combines hands-on instrumentation work, process engineering delivery, and pharmaceutical facility engineering. This gives me a practical perspective: engineering is not only calculation or maintenance, but the ability to understand problems, coordinate stakeholders, and produce reliable outcomes.

I am interested in roles and projects related to process engineering, pharmaceutical engineering, HVAC/BMS, instrumentation, utility systems, energy efficiency, and automation-enabled facility improvement.
